{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Destroyer
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is the apprentice of the [[Destroyer]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Destroyer]] has an adopted son.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
